base_artifact.known_gap: The root mix uses coarse lc16k-style tiers; it does not expose 32-64K, 64-128K, or 128K+ as selectable training buckets.

recipes.purpose: Make the existing FinePDFs-Edu long tail directly trainable for 64K and 128K stages.

stream_upload.languages: all FinePDFs-Edu languages present in longctx.languages

acceptance_checks: mix/data_mix.json contains all six lc128k tiers
At least 30 languages contribute to 32_64k or longer
The 128k_plus tier is not English-only
A 32K Megatron smoke run can read the generated data_path.args

recipes.purpose: Teach retrieval from beginning, middle, and end positions so training does not reward cropping to the last window.
source_datasets: synthetic deterministic facts generated by scripts/make_anti_cropping_traces.py
target_tasks: single-key retrieval with answer after a long distractor span
acceptance_checks: Held-out NIAH prompts use different keys and values from training
Evidence is evenly assigned to first, middle, and final thirds
The dataset remains below 5 percent of continued-pretraining tokens

recipes.purpose: Create realistic 256K, 512K, 1M, and 2M sequences where natural documents alone are too short.
construction_rules: Concatenate by language and broad topic rather than random mixing
Preserve natural order for books, legal bundles, and repositories
Cap any single source family so the model does not learn a synthetic separator-only domain
acceptance_checks: At least 80 percent of 512K+ examples contain multiple relevant segments
Every example has document-boundary markers
No evaluation book/repository/legal bundle appears in training

recipes.purpose: Fill OpenEuroLLM target languages absent from FinePDFs-Edu: Irish, Albanian, and Luxembourgish.
source_datasets: CulturaX if licensing and access are acceptable
language-specific public-domain or permissive web/text corpora
acceptance_checks: Language ID confidence is recorded per document
PII and boilerplate filters are run before tokenization
Low-resource languages are upsampled only after quality filtering

recipes.purpose: Minimal synthetic train/eval data for a <=2000 GPU-hour experiment targeting 2M-token positional extrapolation.
source_datasets: deterministic synthetic logs generated by scripts/make_2m_curriculum_data.py
acceptance_checks: Train shards contain only 32K-256K physical contexts
Eval shards include 512K, 1M, and 2M held-out contexts
Train and eval seeds/key namespaces remain separate
Every row contains task, depth, answer, needle_key, and pose metadata

recipes.purpose: Keep clean validation and evaluation data separate from all synthetic and natural long-context training data.
source_datasets: held-out books, repositories, legal bundles, and topic clusters
acceptance_checks: Needle keys and answer values are disjoint from retrieval curriculum training
Holdout source document IDs are denylisted in training recipe manifests
Evaluation reports include accuracy by depth, language, and length
